title: Cozy Cafe
description: The cafe experience brought to Minecraft. With colorful and convenient drinks!
body:
### Cozy Cafe v2.0 is now out

Updated gallery coming soon.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack!

## About

Cozy Cafe is a mod that adds customizable food items in the form of drinks.  
Drinks are made of at least a *liquid* and a flavor, and at most a *liquid*, a *sweetener*, a *main flavor* and a *secondary flavor*.  
Nearly 10,000 possible ingredient combinations, not counting different potions.  
Additionally, there are 6 drink containers available, each being dyeable in all 16 colors on top of the default:

- Cocktail glass - 3 uses, very fast, 1 flavor max
- Split coconut - 3 uses, fast, 2 flavor max
- Glass cup - 6 uses, fast, 1 flavor max
- Soda bottle - 6 uses, average, 2 flavor max
- Glass can - 9 uses, average, 1 flavor max
- Glass tumbler - 9 uses, slow, 2 flavor max

Each container possesses different properties.
Note that *slow* here corresponds to the vanilla eating speed

Making a drink is as simple as adding the ingredients in a *mixing cup* and mixing until it is read.
Then, filling your desired (and compatible) container with a right click

<details>
<summary>Ingredients</summary>
Note that the *secondary flavor* has a halved effectiveness

Liquids:

- Water
- Sparkling water
- Milk
- Coconut milk
- Chocolate milk
- Dragon's breath

Sweeteners:

- Sugar
- Honey
- Nether wart - allows to add potions as flavors
- Glow ink - reveals nearby mobs
- Glowstone - reveals nearby mobs
- Ghast tear
- Magma cream

Flavors:

- Bamboo
- Cherry
- Chorus - allows to teleport a short distance
- Glow berries
- Sweet berries
- Pumpkin
- Melon
- Matcha
- Spore blossom
- Apple
- Sculk
- Potion

</details>

<details>
<summary>Dyeing</summary>
The mod adds a new placeable item for all your dyeing needs, the dye vat.

Place the dye vat in the world and insert your chosen dye inside.
You are then able to insert containers, drinks, wool, concrete, candles, terracotta and glass to be dyed with some time.

Remove the dye vat's current color with an empty hand.

(Mod compatibility would have to be done manually, don't expect other mod's blocks and item to be dyeable by it just yet)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Juicing</summary>
All flavors but matcha and potions have to be juiced to be used in a drink.

For this purpose, their base ingredient has to be inserted in a juicer as well as empty bottles.
(cozy cafe bottle and not vanilla)  
Finally, right-click the juice to start the process.

</details>

### Additional features

The *ingredient shelf* can display up to 4 stacks of items.
It can be pulled from to fill a *mixing cup* for mixing by right-clicking the cup when the shelf is in range

*Coconuts* are dropped by decaying jungle leaves.
Throwing one splits in half and drops 2 *split coconuts* usable as drink containers.

*Matcha tea bags* can be found in village chests and sold by wandering trader

## Upcoming

I plan to bring this mod to 1.20.1 when I have the time to.  
The biggest features I'm working on are a cafe minigame and an ingredient book.


## Thank you

I make mods as a hobby, and I'm excited to polish and expand on them.  
Stay tuned as I have many mods planned, each better than the last!

Thank you for viewing my mods <3
